heroTitle: Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen for Climate-Resilient Roads
heroDescription: Bitumpro Products Inc. is a British Columbia-based manufacturing startup developing Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB), a next-generation asphalt binder engineered for superior durability, rutting resistance, cold-weather flexibility, and lower lifecycle maintenance costs.
aboutUsDescription: Bitumpro will operate from a 2,000 m² facility in British Columbia with a scalable production design of 500 tons per month and up to 6,000 tons per year. In its first phase, the company focuses on serving Canadian municipalities, highway contractors, asphalt mix producers, and infrastructure developers with a reliable domestic supply of high-performance Nano PMB.
ourVisionDescription: To become a leading innovator and trusted supplier of high-performance nano-modified bitumen solutions for durable, climate-resilient infrastructure across North America and global markets.
ourMissionDescription: To engineer and deliver next-generation asphalt binders that outperform traditional solutions in strength, sustainability, lifecycle value, and adaptability to Canada’s freeze-thaw cycles, heavy traffic, and climate extremes.
ourValuesInnovationDescription: Combining polymer and nano-additive technology to create a premium performance tier in the asphalt binder market.
ourValuesSustainabilityDescription: Extending pavement life, reducing repeated maintenance cycles, and lowering logistics impact through domestic BC production.
ourValuesExcellenceDescription: Supporting adoption through QC laboratory testing, pilot batches, technical validation, and project-specific guidance.
ourValuesIntegrityDescription: Building long-term trust with municipalities, transportation agencies, contractors, asphalt plants, suppliers, and investors.
ourProductsDescription: Our product roadmap starts with Nano PMB for the Canadian market, then expands toward Nano Bitumen Emulsions and Nano Asphalt Sealers for urban resurfacing, cold mix applications, waterproofing, and export growth.
bitumenForLandRestorationDescription: A nano-clay and polymer modified asphalt binder designed to improve rutting resistance, cracking resistance, thermal stability, elasticity, and pavement service life.
ecoFriendlyPackagingDescription: A lean 2,000 m² production facility designed for controlled startup operations, dependable lead times, QC testing, and future product-line expansion.
globalDistributionDescription: A phased growth plan beginning in Canada and expanding from Year 3 into the United States and selected South American markets where high-performance binders are in demand.
contactUsDescription: Contact Bitumpro for Nano PMB specifications, pilot project discussions, technical validation, pricing, partnership opportunities, or infrastructure project support.
canadaOfficeAddress: 1470 Camelot RD, West Vancouver, BC, Canada
readyToRestoreDescription: Explore how Bitumpro’s Nano PMB can help reduce maintenance cycles, improve pavement performance, and support climate-resilient infrastructure for municipalities, contractors, asphalt plants, and developers.
